purpose: A literature-informed, non-exhaustive boundary audit for sheep-ovary annotation. It is not a required label list and does not imply that every candidate is present.

candidate_boundaries.release_rule: Coherent granulosa backbone with somatic anti-program clearance and follicular morphology; functional subtypes are optional and high-confidence only.
Use the dedicated contamination-safe route only when a multi-module candidate exists; non-ZP identity, somatic anti-program and object morphology must all pass.
Require a coherent steroidogenic/androgenic program and compatible outer-follicular morphology; ECM, LHCGR or wall location alone is insufficient.
Require reproductive-stage compatibility, coherent steroidogenesis and a corpus-luteum-like structure; granulosa-lutein/theca-lutein are optional fine labels.
Use as the honest generic parent after separately auditing steroidogenic, mature-contractile, mural and endothelial alternatives.
Require a stable S100A4/progenitor-like program and morphology distinct from generic stroma; generic collagen/DCN/LUM is insufficient.
Require a mature MYH11/CNN1/ACTG2-centered contractile backbone, stable separation and coherent structural tracks.
Require a coherent RGS5/PDGFRB/CSPG4/NOTCH3/MCAM mural program and vascular adjacency, not ACTA2 or proximity alone; release broad Vascular-associated with optional fine Pericyte/mural.
Release the broad Vascular-associated parent when a coherent endothelial backbone and branching morphology pass; preserve Blood endothelial as an optional fine identity.
Require both an endothelial backbone and coherent PROX1/FLT4/MMRN1/LYVE1/PDPN/CCL21 support; otherwise retain broad Vascular-associated.
Establish the broad immune lineage first; myeloid, lymphoid, plasma/B and granulocyte labels are optional high-confidence children only.
Require a coherent epithelial/mesothelial program and compatible surface morphology; WT1, MUC16 or an isolated keratin alone is insufficient.
Require a coherent SOX10/S100B/PLP1/MPZ-like glial program, anti-program clearance and nerve-track morphology.
Require a CHGA/CHGB/SYP/SCG/INSM1 secretory core plus compatible morphology; isolated neuronal genes remain state evidence.
